title: Forge Optimizations
description: The definitive performance foundation for 1.20.1 Forge. Optimized for Max FPS, Max TPS, and Max RAM efficiency.
body:
![Forge Optimozations Banner](https://placehold.co/1200x400/DB1F29/white/?text=Forge+Optimizations)

Forge Optimizations is a high-performance, open-source modpack foundation designed to make Minecraft run smoother, faster, and more efficiently. Unlike standard packs, this is a pre-tuned "Engine" for your game—built to be the definitive starting point for any Forge player or modpack developer.

**🚀 The Max 3 Philosophy**
Every version of this pack is built around three core pillars of performance:

**MAX FPS**: Advanced rendering overhauls using Embeddium, ImmediatelyFast, and Entity Culling to eliminate GPU bottlenecks.

**MAX TPS**: Server-side logic optimizations via Radium (Lithium) and Starlight to ensure your world "ticks" at a rock-solid 20 TPS.

**MAX RAM**: Significant memory heap reductions using FerriteCore and ModernFix, allowing you to play more with less.

### 💎 OptiFine Parity (Without the Lag)
Enjoy all the visual features of OptiFine with none of its closed-source instability:

✅ Shaders: Full support via Oculus.

✅ Connected Textures: Native CTM support through Fusion and Athena.

✅ Custom Mob Models: EMF and ETF integration for trailer-quality animations.

✅ Dynamic Lights: Fast, real-time lighting for held torches.

✅ Zoom: A smooth, cinematic zoom keybind (C).

### 📂 Cross-Version Support
We are committed to long-term support. While the current flagship is 1.20.1, we are actively developing versions for:

**Lite Editions**: Specific "Potato" configurations for systems with 2GB-4GB of RAM.

More version will be added Soon!

### 📦 Installation & Setup
RAM Allocation: We recommend (1-2GB Minimum) 4GB - 8GB for the best experience.

JVM Arguments: For ultimate stability, we recommend using ZGC (standard in most modern launchers like UltimMC/Prism).

Server-Side: This pack is fully compatible with servers. Install it on your client to boost FPS, and use it on your server to boost TPS and reduce crashes.
